basic_details.job_title: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 47 Senior Resident & Specialist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC), Ministry of Labour & Employment, Govt. of India
basic_details.total_vacancies: Senior Resident, Contractual Senior Resident, Full Time Contractual Specialist, Full Time/Part Time Contractual Super Specialist
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (Annexure A, B, C submitted on the day of interview)
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Hospital, Okhla, New Delhi has released a walk-in interview notification (F. No. 114-A-11/12/27/2011-OKH, dated 23.07.2026) for the recruitment of Senior Resident, Specialist, and Super Specialist doctors on a contractual/residency basis. Interviews will be held on 27 July 2026 for Senior Resident posts and on 28 July 2026 for Specialist/Super Specialist posts, with a reporting time of 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM on the respective days.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 23 July 2026 Walk-in Interview for Senior Resident: 27 July 2026 Walk-in Interview for Specialist/Super Specialist: 28 July 2026 Reporting Time (both days): 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM | The venue for the interview is ESIC Hospital, Sri Anandmayee Marg, Phase-1, Okhla, New Delhi-110020. A separate or exact interview venue room number is not specified in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates is applicable as per rule. The OBC certificate must be in the prescribed format certifying that the candidate does not belong to the creamy layer. Reservation for PWD candidates is as per rule.

qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized university, registered with the Delhi Medical Council, Medical Council of India, or State Medical Council. If PG/Diploma doctors are not available, MBBS doctors without a PG degree, having two years of experience (including 1 year in the concerned specialty) from a government or private hospital (not a private clinic), may be appointed for 1 year on contract. As per the latest National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI) guidelines, if Super-Speciality Senior Residents (MCh/DM) are not available, Senior Residents from the concerned parent broad specialities will be considered. If no suitable candidate is available against an advertised post, any other candidate present may be considered for Senior Resident irrespective of category, for short-term engagement. | PG Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty, registered with DMC/MCI/State Medical Council. Candidates with at least 2 years' experience after MBBS (1 year in the concerned specialty/discipline) may also appear if no PG/Diploma candidate appears in the identical specialty. | MBBS with Post Graduate degree/diploma in the concerned speciality from a recognized university. 3 years' experience after acquiring the PG Degree (for Junior Specialist - Level 11), or 5 years' experience after acquiring the PG Diploma (for Senior Specialist - Level 12). Registered with DMC/MCI/State Medical Council. | MBBS, MD/MS/DNB with DM/DNB/M.Ch in the concerned Super Speciality from an MCI-recognized medical college, registered with DMC/MCI/State Medical Council. Entry Level: 3 years' experience in the concerned Super-Speciality after the first PG degree, or 5 years' experience after the PG diploma. Senior Level: 5 years' experience in the concerned Super-Speciality after the first PG degree. For DM/M.Ch qualifications of five years' duration, the senior PG residency period rendered in the last part of the course counts towards the experience requirement.

salary_details.senior resident (under residency scheme): Rs. 67,700/- (Level-11, 7th CPC matrix) + other allowances per month as applicable. Rs. 1,350/- deducted if the SR possesses only a diploma.
salary_details.part time super specialist - entry level: Rs. 1,00,000/- + Rs. 20,000/- visiting charge for emergency call; Rs. 1,200/- extra per hour beyond 16 hrs/week
salary_details.part time super specialist - consultant/: Rs. 1,50,000/- + Rs. 20,000/- visiting charge for emergency call; Rs. 1,500/- extra per hour beyond 16 hrs/week

selection_process: Selection is made purely through a walk-in interview - there is no written examination or online application process. Candidates must appear in person on the notified date and time with the prescribed application form and all original/photocopied documents for verification. The decision of the Selection Board is final on all aspects of selection.
how_to_apply: Download and fill Annexure A (Bio-Data Form), Annexure B (Educational Qualification & Experience details), and Annexure C (Self-Declaration) in block letters.

Report to ESIC Hospital, Sri Anandmayee Marg, Phase-1, Okhla, New Delhi-110020, between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the applicable interview date (27 July 2026 for Senior Resident; 28 July 2026 for Specialist/Super Specialist).

Submit the filled forms along with attested photocopies of the Matriculation Certificate, proof of age, caste certificate (if applicable), MBBS certificate, Diploma/Degree certificate, valid DMC/MCI/State registration certificate, and experience certificate(s), together with the original documents for verification.
Carry two recent passport-size photographs and proof of residence.
Submit the applicable Demand Draft towards the application fee (where applicable), in favour of "ESI Fund A/c No. 01," payable at New Delhi.
important_instructions: Private practice of any kind is not allowed for full-time contractual engagements; violation may attract action under relevant rules. Recruitment is purely contractual; selected candidates have no claim to regularization of service. Canvassing in any form leads to disqualification. Candidates already in service must submit a "No Objection Certificate" from their employer at the time of interview. The contractual engagement may be terminated by either side with one month's prior notice, without assigning any reason. No service benefits such as PF, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, Seniority, or Promotion are admissible. Absence from work for 10 days without proper permission amounts to abandonment of engagement; no separate disengagement order is necessary in such cases. If a selected candidate resigns within 6 months of joining, an experience certificate will not be issued; in case of termination, the certificate may be withheld. No TA/DA is payable for appearing in the interview or for joining the post. No hostel accommodation, quarters, or uniform will be provided. On joining, the selected candidate must deposit Rs. 10,000/- via demand draft/banker's cheque in favour of "ESIC Fund Account No. 1," refundable after completion of a minimum of 3 months' service (including the 30-day notice period) and submission of a "No Dues Certificate." Selected contractual candidates must sign an Agreement as per ESIC norms on a non-judicial stamp paper of Rs. 100/-, with the stamp paper cost borne by the candidate. The Medical Superintendent, ESIC Hospital Okhla, reserves the right to fill any or no posts, or cancel the interview at any stage, and the number of posts may increase or decrease as per requirement.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Hospital, Okhla, New Delhi has officially released Notification No. F. No. 114-A-11/12/27/2011-OKH dated 23.07.2026 for the recruitment of Senior Resident, Contractual Senior Resident, Full-Time Contractual Specialist, and Full-Time/Part-Time Contractual Super Specialist on a contractual/residency basis. The notification contains complete information regarding department-wise vacancies, educational qualifications, age limit, salary, reservation, application fee, walk-in interview schedule, required documents, terms of engagement, and selection procedure. Candidates interested in these medical posts are advised to read the detailed notification carefully before appearing for the walk-in interview. Download ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Date: 23 July 2026 Walk-in Interview for Senior Resident: 27 July 2026 Walk-in Interview for Specialist/Super Specialist: 28 July 2026 Reporting Time (both days): 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM The venue for the interview is ESIC Hospital, Sri Anandmayee Marg, Phase-1, Okhla, New Delhi-110020. A separate or exact interview venue room number is not specified in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 - ESIC Okhla Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: Tenure: 3 years, subject to annual evaluation and renewal based on satisfactory performance. Note: Candidates who have already worked as a Senior Resident under the 3-year Central Residency Scheme for 3 years are not eligible to apply again. Senior Residents already working in a Govt. institution must apply through proper channel. Vacancy positions are subject to change at the discretion of the Medical Superintendent. Specific department-wise vacancy numbers for this category are not specified separately in the official notification. Note: Vacancy positions across all categories are subject to change at the discretion of the Medical Superintendent, and the number of posts may be increased or decreased as per requirement.

3. Full Time Contractual Specialist - 12 Posts (3-Year Tenure)

content_sections.heading: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria & Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Post Graduate Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized university, registered with the Delhi Medical Council, Medical Council of India, or State Medical Council. If PG/Diploma doctors are not available, MBBS doctors without a PG degree, having two years of experience (including 1 year in the concerned specialty) from a government or private hospital (not a private clinic), may be appointed for 1 year on contract. As per the latest National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI) guidelines, if Super-Speciality Senior Residents (MCh/DM) are not available, Senior Residents from the concerned parent broad specialities will be considered. If no suitable candidate is available against an advertised post, any other candidate present may be considered for Senior Resident irrespective of category, for short-term engagement. PG Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty, registered with DMC/MCI/State Medical Council. Candidates with at least 2 years' experience after MBBS (1 year in the concerned specialty/discipline) may also appear if no PG/Diploma candidate appears in the identical specialty. MBBS with Post Graduate degree/diploma in the concerned speciality from a recognized university. 3 years' experience after acquiring the PG Degree (for Junior Specialist - Level 11), or 5 years' experience after acquiring the PG Diploma (for Senior Specialist - Level 12). Registered with DMC/MCI/State Medical Council. MBBS, MD/MS/DNB with DM/DNB/M.Ch in the concerned Super Speciality from an MCI-recognized medical college, registered with DMC/MCI/State Medical Council. Entry Level: 3 years' experience in the concerned Super-Speciality after the first PG degree, or 5 years' experience after the PG diploma. Senior Level: 5 years' experience in the concerned Super-Speciality after the first PG degree. For DM/M.Ch qualifications of five years' duration, the senior PG residency period rendered in the last part of the course counts towards the experience requirement.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates is applicable as per rule. The OBC certificate must be in the prescribed format certifying that the candidate does not belong to the creamy layer. Reservation for PWD candidates is as per rule.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is made purely through a walk-in interview - there is no written examination or online application process. Candidates must appear in person on the notified date and time with the prescribed application form and all original/photocopied documents for verification. The decision of the Selection Board is final on all aspects of selection.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026 - Documents Required for Walk-in Interview
content_sections.text: Candidates must bring original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including: Identity Proof (PAN Card, Passport, Driving Licence, Voter Card, Aadhaar Card, etc.) Address Proof (Ration Card, Passport, Driving Licence, Aadhaar Card, etc.) Date of Birth Certificate (10th Certificate/Birth Certificate) Two recent passport-size photographs Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, and Bank Passbook photocopies (only for selected candidates, at the time of joining) Class 10th and 12th Mark Sheets and Certificates MBBS, MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh Degree and Experience Certificate(s), as applicable, per NMC guidelines Registration Certificate with Medical Council of India/State Medical Council Internship Completion Certificate Reservation category certificate (OBC/SC/ST/PH/EWS) in the Government of India prescribed format OBC Certificate: Must be issued not prior to 1 year from the cut-off date, in the prescribed format, by an officer not below the rank of Sub-Divisional Officer or equivalent. EWS Certificate: Must be as per Annexure-I of the DoPT Office Memorandum No. 36039/1/2019-Estt (Res), dated 31.01.2019.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ESIC Okhla Walk-in Interview 2026
content_sections.text: Download and fill Annexure A (Bio-Data Form), Annexure B (Educational Qualification & Experience details), and Annexure C (Self-Declaration) in block letters. Report to ESIC Hospital, Sri Anandmayee Marg, Phase-1, Okhla, New Delhi-110020, between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the applicable interview date (27 July 2026 for Senior Resident; 28 July 2026 for Specialist/Super Specialist). Submit the filled forms along with attested photocopies of the Matriculation Certificate, proof of age, caste certificate (if applicable), MBBS certificate, Diploma/Degree certificate, valid DMC/MCI/State registration certificate, and experience certificate(s), together with the original documents for verification. Carry two recent passport-size photographs and proof of residence. Submit the applicable Demand Draft towards the application fee (where applicable), in favour of "ESI Fund A/c No. 01," payable at New Delhi.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions / Terms & Conditions
content_sections.text: Private practice of any kind is not allowed for full-time contractual engagements; violation may attract action under relevant rules. Recruitment is purely contractual; selected candidates have no claim to regularization of service. Canvassing in any form leads to disqualification. Candidates already in service must submit a "No Objection Certificate" from their employer at the time of interview. The contractual engagement may be terminated by either side with one month's prior notice, without assigning any reason. No service benefits such as PF, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, Seniority, or Promotion are admissible. Absence from work for 10 days without proper permission amounts to abandonment of engagement; no separate disengagement order is necessary in such cases. If a selected candidate resigns within 6 months of joining, an experience certificate will not be issued; in case of termination, the certificate may be withheld. No TA/DA is payable for appearing in the interview or for joining the post. No hostel accommodation, quarters, or uniform will be provided. On joining, the selected candidate must deposit Rs. 10,000/- via demand draft/banker's cheque in favour of "ESIC Fund Account No. 1," refundable after completion of a minimum of 3 months' service (including the 30-day notice period) and submission of a "No Dues Certificate." Selected contractual candidates must sign an Agreement as per ESIC norms on a non-judicial stamp paper of Rs. 100/-, with the stamp paper cost borne by the candidate. The Medical Superintendent, ESIC Hospital Okhla, reserves the right to fill any or no posts, or cancel the interview at any stage, and the number of posts may increase or decrease as per requirement.

faq.question: Q1. When is the ESIC Okhla walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Senior Resident posts is on 27 July 2026, and for Specialist/Super Specialist posts on 28 July 2026, with reporting time from 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM on both days.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ESIC Okhla Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 26 Senior Resident (Under Residency Scheme) posts, 12 Full Time Contractual Specialist posts, and 9 Full Time/Part Time Contractual Super Specialist posts. Vacancy numbers for Contractual Senior Resident (against GDMO) are not specified separately.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for ESIC Okhla Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 45 years as on 27.07.2026, with relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per rule.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Specialist and Super Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 69 years as on 28.07.2026 for both Full Time Contractual Specialist and Super Specialist posts

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for ESIC Okhla Senior Resident?
faq.answer: Senior Residents under the Residency Scheme receive Rs. 67,700/- (Level-11, 7th CPC) plus allowances; Non-PG Senior Residents on 1-year contract receive a consolidated Rs. 1,50,294/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for ESIC Okhla walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Yes. Rs. 500/- for candidates in categories other than SC/ST/PH/Female; the fee is Nil for SC/ST/PH and Female candidates. Payment is via Demand Draft in favour of "ESI Fund A/c No. 01," payable at New Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the ESIC Okhla walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Identity proof, address proof, date of birth certificate, educational mark sheets and certificates (10th, 12th, MBBS, PG), MCI/DMC registration certificate, experience certificates, category certificates (if applicable), and two passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of Senior Resident, Specialist, and Super Specialist posts?
faq.answer: Senior Resident (Under Residency Scheme) is for 3 years with annual evaluation. Full Time Contractual Specialist is for 3 years. Full Time Contractual Super Specialist is for 3 years, and Part Time Contractual Super Specialist is for 1 year, or till a regular incumbent joins, whichever is earlier.
